testcase.name: beforeMethod

failure.message: Could not start a new session. Possible causes are invalid address of the remote server or browser start-up failure. Host info: host: 'Sovans-MacBook-Pro.local', ip: '2601:500:8300:9a40:fdc5:2feb:338:ac53%en0'
